role_summary: the deputy cfo supp orts the cfo in managing finance functions and ensures smooth  execution of financial strategies.
responsibilities: • assist cfo in financial planning and strategy execution   • oversee financial operations and reporting   • manage finance teams and cross -functio nal coordination   • ensure compliance and internal controls   • step in as acting cfo when required   • support board and investor reporting
qualifications: • ca with senior leadership experience   • strong operational and strategic finance skills
